# WeBot Studio

> WeBot Studio is the checkout, intake, dashboard, and review surface for WeBot Agency reviewed agent jobs.

Canonical site: https://webot.studio/
Agency site: https://webot.agency/

## Main Pages

- [Studio homepage](https://webot.studio/): Agent family chooser, checkout path, dashboard demo, and customer-facing review checkpoints.
- [Agent jobs](https://webot.studio/agent-jobs.html): Reviewed AI agent job families and delivery model.
- [Pricing](https://webot.studio/pricing.html): Current live checkout paths, one-time reviewed jobs, and live monthly platform account tiers starting with the $5 Pilot Test.

## What customers can buy

- Current live Starter monthly access: $49/mo for one focused active project path.
- Current live Plus monthly access: $149/mo for more recurring personal or business work.
- Current live Business monthly access: $399/mo for concurrent projects, dashboard history, and workflow setup.
- Current live Small one-time reviewed job: $49 for one small scoped deliverable.
- Current live Standard one-time reviewed job: $129 for one fuller deliverable with more source material or formatting.
- Current live Deep one-time reviewed job: $299 for deeper research, heavier cleanup, multi-source extraction, or larger reviewed output.
- Platform account tiers are live with Stripe checkout at https://app.webot.studio: Pilot Test $5, Human $10/$20/$30, API-only $7/$14/$21, Both $15/$30/$45.

## Agent families

- Create & Design: custom image generation, image upscaling and enhancement, logo concepts, greeting cards and social visuals, and creative writing of all types.
- Documents & Data: PDF creation, editing, and forms, OCR and scanned-document cleanup, scraping and structured data extraction, and spreadsheet and invoice cleanup.
- Research: website research and source pulls, research and comparison briefs, and fact-check and evidence packs built on checkable sources.
- Voice & Audio: text-to-MP3 voice generation, voice cloning from a customer sample, audio and video transcription, and audio cleanup and format conversion.

## Dashboard path

Paid customer work moves through payment + intake, agent route, agent draft, lead review, fresh-context review, customer approval, and complete delivery.

## Google Search Setup

The canonical sitemap is https://webot.studio/sitemap.xml. Search Console verification and sitemap submission require access to the verified Google property; do not claim submission until Search Console confirms it.
